content.text_share_your_thoughts: Whakapuaki i ō whakaaro ki ngā kiritaki ētahi atu
content.text_people_found_helpful: ngā tāngata i kite i tēnei āwhina
content.no_review_text_no_review: Kāore he whakaputanga i tēnei wā. He whakahoki whakaaro? Kia mōhio mai
content.modal_review_placeholder_customer_name: Tāuru i tō ingoa i konei
content.modal_review_placeholder_customer_email: Ko tō īmēra he taumata rahui, ā, ka whakamahia hei tukuna i a koe ngā whakakupu whakakore
content.modal_review_placeholder_review_content: Tauira: Nō te wā i hoko ai ahau i tēnei marama i whakamahia i te nui. Ko te mea pai rawa ki ahau i tēnei whakaputanga ko...
content.modal_pending_review_subtitle: Kua tukuna tō tuhinga i te whakararuraru, ā, ka whakararuraru kia whakatau ai i ā mātou whakaritenga me ā mātou whakararuraru. Kia whakararuraru i ētahi wā ki te whakararuraru i tō tuhinga.
content.modal_success_review_title: Tuhinga i tukuna i te whakatūturu!
content.modal_success_review_subtitle: Whakawhetai ana māu i te whakapau kōrero i tō whaiaro me te whakararuraru, ka whai whāinga nui tēnei mō ngā kiritaki ētahi atu.
content.modal_report_subtitle: Whakawhetai ana māu i te whakatūturu i a {{ shopname }}. He koreutu tō whakapuaki.
content.modal_report_option_1: Kei roto i te whakaputanga ngā mōhiohio tūmataiti.
content.modal_report_option_2: Kei roto i te whakaputanga ngā kupu whakaparahako.
content.modal_report_option_3: Kei roto i te whakaputanga ngā whakapāho, ngā whakapāho rānei.
content.modal_report_option_4: Kei roto i te whakaputanga ngā āhua whakararuraru, whakararuraru rānei.
content.no_media: Kāore he ataata i tukuna i tēnei wā!
content.no_image: Kāore he whakaahua i tukuna i tēnei wā!
content.no_video: Kāore he ataata i tukuna i tēnei wā!
content.media_rule_size: *Me iti i te 10MB te rahi o te ataata
content.media_upload_fail: *Kāore e taea te tuku i te whakaahua. Whakamātau anō i muri i tēnei
content.media_upload_duplicate: *Kua tuku kē tēnei whakaahua e koe
